title: Curation ceremonies: roadmap-curate + plan-curate subcommands with buildCurationSuggestions parallels
body: Step 6. Mirror lens-curate's pattern (packages/pi-context/src/lens-view.ts:116, packages/pi-context/src/index.ts:1042). buildRoadmapCurationSuggestions(view: RoadmapView) enumerates the roadmap's composition lenses and surfaces unbinned items per phase as append-block-item suggestions for relations.json with relation_type='phase_member' + suggested ordinal. buildPlanCurationSuggestions(view: PlanView) enumerates plan items missing depends_on edges against the existing block items they reference and surfaces dependency suggestions. /project roadmap-curate <ROADMAP-id> + /project plan-curate <PLAN-id> handlers use pi.sendMessage with { triggerTurn: true, deliverAs: 'followUp' } to drive the LLM through the curation. No new write surface — LLM persists via existing append-block-item.
